name: UEFN Exporter (WASM)
description: Export entities to Unreal Editor for Fortnite (UEFN) projects. Generate Verse data structures, device configurations, NPC dialogue trees, and Creative island metadata from Studio entities.
author: BiloxiStudios

uefn_project_path.label: UEFN Project Path
uefn_project_path.description: Path to the UEFN project root directory

verse_module.label: Verse Module Name
verse_module.description: Target Verse module for generated code

include_dialogue.label: Include Dialogue Export
include_dialogue.description: Export character dialogue trees as Verse-compatible dialogue data

creative_version.label: Creative Version
creative_version.description: Target Fortnite Creative version for compatibility

generate_verse_classes.label: Generate Verse Classes
generate_verse_classes.description: Auto-generate Verse class definitions from entity templates

generate_device_configs.label: Generate Device Configs
generate_device_configs.description: Create UEFN device configuration files for NPC and gameplay entities

export_portraits_as_textures.label: Export Portraits as Island Textures
export_portraits_as_textures.description: Copy entity portraits for use as billboards or UI textures in Creative islands

npc_behavior_template.label: NPC Behavior Template
npc_behavior_template.description: Default Verse behavior template for character exports (patrol, idle, dialogue)

island_metadata_sync.label: Sync Island Metadata
island_metadata_sync.description: Push entity names/descriptions to island metadata fields

quest_to_device_mapping.label: Map Quests to Devices
quest_to_device_mapping.description: Convert Studio quest entities into UEFN quest device chains
